---
title: "Hi, I'm Harish"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  feed: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  image-height: "148px"
  image-align: right
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

Personal notes about programming, machine Learning and other stuff in general. This is my scratchpad to write about things I learn. Also a place to improve my writing skills.

# Recent posts
